steps.title: Use the graph shortcut
steps.content: For a system of two graphed linear equations, the solution is the single point that lies on both lines. Since the question asks only for $x$, you only need the $x$-coordinate of the intersection.

steps.title: Read the intersection
steps.content: The two lines cross at the grid point $(4,1)$. In the ordered pair $(x,y)=(4,1)$, the first coordinate is $x=4$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The prompt asks for the $x$-value, not the full ordered pair, so the answer is 4.
